title: styrax officinalis subsp. redivivus
intro: Styrax officinalis subsp. redivivus, also known as the Mexican styrax or star anise tree, is a plant species in the family Styracaceae, characterized by its fragrant, star-shaped flowers and smooth, gray bark. Traditionally used in folk medicine, the plant's resin has been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Styrax officinalis subsp. redivivus include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's resin can be prepared into herbal remedies like tinctures, salves, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
